title: Training
subtitle: Two ways to turn your mistakes into active learning.

ghost.title: Ghost Table
ghost.desc: Drills focused on your highest-error spots. The SRS system schedules automatic reviews — reinforcing your costliest patterns before they surface in real play.
ghost.f1: Spots extracted automatically from your history
ghost.f3: 25 XP per completed drill, 100 XP on mastery

sparring.title: Sparring Mode
sparring.desc: Play historical hands pausing at each real decision point. The engine evaluates every choice with the same rigor as the tournament analysis, and results are registered in the SRS.
sparring.f1: Hand auto-selected by your worst recent mistake
sparring.f2: Full visual table with real positions, folds and bets
sparring.f3: Integrates directly with Ghost Table via SRS
